hero.title: The technology stack behind CaribAI’s systems, infrastructure, and growth.
hero.description: CaribAI is built on practical technologies chosen to support AI engineering, intelligent workflows, digital infrastructure, and long-term software growth.

primary.title: The core tools behind current CaribAI systems and software directions
primary.description: These are the main technologies shaping the public products, internal systems, infrastructure, and software directions across the CaribAI ecosystem.

items.title: Python
items.label: Core Language
items.description: Core language for backend engineering, AI integrations, automation logic, and system workflows.

items.title: FastAPI
items.label: Backend Framework
items.description: Framework for APIs, internal services, automation backends, and AI-powered system flows.

items.title: PostgreSQL
items.label: Data Layer
items.description: Primary database layer for application records, workflow data, and long-term system reliability.

items.title: SQLAlchemy
items.label: ORM
items.description: Structured database access and application modeling for backend systems and product workflows.

items.title: Redis
items.label: Performance
items.description: Caching, queue support, and faster workflows for apps and automation systems that need more responsiveness.

items.title: Docker
items.label: Deployment
items.description: Consistent build, test, and deployment environments that make applications easier to run and scale.

secondary.title: The supporting technologies that make the ecosystem more capable
secondary.description: These tools help CaribAI move from focused digital tools into stronger automation, AI systems, and scalable software over time.

items.title: OpenAI API
items.label: AI Layer
items.description: Model-powered workflows, structured outputs, and intelligent application features for modern AI systems.

items.title: GitHub
items.label: Version Control
items.description: Version control, collaboration, deployment flow, and a visible engineering record behind the work.

items.title: JavaScript
items.label: Frontend Logic
items.description: Frontend behavior, site interactions, and dynamic content rendering across public experiences and internal tools.

items.title: HTML & CSS
items.label: Interface Layer
items.description: Clean, fast interfaces for products, landing pages, storefronts, and supporting brand experiences.

items.title: Vercel
items.label: Hosting
items.description: Fast deployment and hosting for the public-facing CaribAI site and future frontend experiences.

support.title: The wider stack supporting long-term product and system development.

items.title: Frontend
items.description: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and selective use of modern frontend tooling when the product experience needs it.

items.title: Workflow
items.description: Git, GitHub, testing, deployment habits, and engineering discipline that make progress visible over time.

items.title: Growth Edge
items.description: Automation maturity, deeper ML implementation, better deployment workflows, and stronger systems thinking over time.
